data.title: Fairy Tales - Stories for Kids
data.description:
Beautiful fairy tales to spark your child's dreams.
Carefully selected content, music, and a professional narrator.

App Features:
• No registration or login required.
• Offline – works without the need for an internet connection.
• No ads or subscriptions – pay once and have lifetime access.
• Simple interface – designed with children in mind.
• Safe for children – no data collection or permissions required.
• Narrator or the option to read the story by the parent or child.
• Relaxing music and animations – perfect for bedtime reading.

It’s easy for kids of any age to use on their own, so you don’t have to assist.
Your child will return to our stories and favorite characters.

„Minnie the Mouse and the Moonstone” – a magical bedtime story about friendship and helping each other.
„Ricky, the Little Firefighter Robot” – it's worth fighting for your dreams.
„Joey and the Unexpected Adventure” – never leave anyone in need.
„Andy, Mia, and the River of Dreams” – a lovely fable of sibling adventures for the youngest.
„Clever Fox Freddy” – an interesting story with a moral about honesty.
„Hugo the Giant” – not everything is as it seems.
„Knight Arthur and Princess Lily” – a beautiful fairy tale about love and courage

Additionally:
• Interesting visual and sound effects – they spark the imagination.
• Our stories contain messages and morals that are very important for a child's proper development.
• The stories are available in various languages: English, Spanish, Polish, French, Portuguese, German, and Italian.

Let your child immerse in a magical forest full of fairy tales!

Your feedback and suggestions are very important to us.
We are also waiting for your ideas for new stories.
You can describe them in a comment or send them via email.

“Realm of Fantasy”
“Enchanted Places”
“A Meadow of Mysteries”
“RPG Theme”
“Our Mountain”
by Eric Matyas
www.soundimage.org
